demographics.living_situation: lives alone; a neighbour is present at this visit and helps intermittently

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I feel completely drained of all energy, my mouth is so sore I can barely eat, and I passed out twice today when trying to get out of my chair.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The weakness got much worse over the last couple of days and today I fainted twice just from standing up — I'm frightened I'll fall.

symptom_narrative.onset: the tiredness came on slowly over about three months
symptom_narrative.duration: three months of tiredness, but much worse in the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.character: totally drained and weak, and my tongue is smooth, red and very sore
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: so weak I can barely get out of the chair, and I fainted twice today
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over — no energy, and my mouth and tongue
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant tiredness, and the fainting happens when I stand up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting or lying still seems to help; nothing really fixes the tiredness
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up makes me feel faint, and hot or rough food makes my mouth hurt
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: sore red tongue, cracks at the corners of my mouth, barely eating because it hurts
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't stand up safely, I'm stuck in the chair or bed, and I live on my own

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: nothing much that I know of — I haven't been to a doctor in a long while

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: I mostly just have tea and toast — I don't really cook or buy fresh vegetables anymore
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, finds shopping and cooking hard; a neighbour looks in on her

objective_data_offered.value: she fainted twice today when standing up from the chair, and feels like she will black out whenever she tries to stand
tongue looks smooth, shiny and red; cracks and soreness at both corners of the mouth; she looks very pale and washed out
neighbour says she has been getting weaker for weeks, is barely eating, looks pale, and nearly went down twice today when she stood up
kitchen has only tea, bread and packaged shelf-stable food; no fresh produce
